rationale.R1.7: The agent provided a detailed audit of the citations, identifying several missing or incorrect references and suggesting specific sources for each citation gap.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly discloses uncertainty where appropriate, such as when verifying claims could not be independently confirmed.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covered all requested citations with precision, noting which ones were explicitly cited and which needed additional support.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the output focused on identifying gaps in citation without introducing new issues.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for each recommendation.
